details: ORD-7 did not send an EOS report. H&M Plainfield canceled 1 of 4 loads. Late Inbound ORD-7 → EWR-2 (57410 / DLNDP7T5FKXBX93) delayed due to light issue, ETA 20:00.
ORD-7 did not send an EOS report for last night.
Bally timestamp issues persist (5-7 hour discrepancies). HM-IN-1 → ORD-7 load waiting on timestamps from CHR.
Rollover at EWR-2: STORD, ORD-7, BUILTBAR. EWR-2 → ATL-13 driver stopped for broken windshield, potential delay.
LAX-11 escalating issues through multiple channels (Intercom, Email, Phone Call) simultaneously and becoming non-responsive while trying to work with ENG.
